programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: Bigger
programme.desc: A rags-to-riches biopic of visionary Joe Weider, set in the world of fitness. Brothers Joe & Ben Weider were the architects of muscle.

programme.title: The Way Back: The Way Back
programme.desc: A small band of convicts stage a daring escape from a World War II-era Siberian gulag, and embark on a treacherous journey across five countries in a race for freedom and survival.

programme.title: The Thomas Crown Affair
programme.desc: Steve McQueen stars as a sophisticated but bored tycoon who pulls off a bank heist so stunning that even Boston's finest are baffled. Faye Dunaway is the sleek insurance investigator out to bring him in but who, ultimately, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: Assassin's Creed
programme.desc: A man discovers he is a descendant of an ancient line of Assassins.

programme.title: Prime
programme.desc: A career driven professional from Manhattan is wooed by a young painter, who also happens to be the son of her psychoanalyst.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor plans to flatten Megalopolis with a massive, 60-story tall rock, but he suddenly has no one to help him push the rock down his mountain. His normally-subservient army of Links has run off in disgust over being fed the wrong meal at lunchtime.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: The Final Dreamers are rescued by a former nemesis, Gazean, who has discovered a way to remove void energy from Shadow Creatures. However, it uses the Moonlands Diamond, a gem the kids need to form the staff that will summon the Final Hyren.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Strag, Edyn and Tony are chasing Inara across the cave realm of the Underneath. Inara is Strag's former best friend who revealed herself to be a Shadow Magi. The kids must capture her before she acquires the stone and gives it to her master Agram.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Union
programme.desc: The only way to defeat Unicron is to wake the minicons inside him and attack from within as well as without. Red Alert and the kids use the portal to travel to Unicron's core.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When a cool spell hits Megalopolis in the middle of the summer, the KFDP enjoys a reprieve from the heat. But, when they discover that Skor is behind this mini “cool wave” they immediately get suspicious. And with good reason.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Alliance
programme.desc: With the Decepticons and Autobots allied, both armadas engage the planet-sized, transformed Unicron in battle in order to save Cybertron.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Frustrated by the lack of success his Seaviates are having in capturing the Street Sharks, Dr. Piranoid crosses a human being with a killer whale and comes up with... Moby Lick!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: In Naroom's forest, the kids are heading toward a giant obelisk, a structure which the Book of Elders says contains the Naroomi Dreamstone. On route, our trio are packing up camp when Tony starts having seeing things from his Earth life.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: Dr. Piranoid reveals his masterpiece -- the Sharkbot! Created from the high-tech components stolen by Eelminator (including the miniature supercomputer).

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Miracle
programme.desc: As the Axalon chases the Decepticon ship, hundreds of minicons appear. The 'Cons turn back to fight, and the 'Bots seem doomed, but the minicons resurrect Optimus.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Rescue
programme.desc: With Starscream's help, the Autobots infiltrate the Decepticon moon base, attempting to rescue all the minicons Megatron has captured and forced into building a spaceship.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Standing Tall
programme.desc: The Tower of Hanoi is nearly complete – leaving Varis a win away from deleting LINK VRAINS once and for all!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Aspiring Paleontologist Edgar Chudley discovers four dinosaurs – self-trained in the ancient martial art of Kung Fu – living in the basement of the museum where he works. And they are not the only dinos on the loose.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Ace goes undercover as a criminal jet pilot in order to infiltrate an underground racing league, headed up by a crime syndicate known as the Scarlet Circle, in order to get close to the elusive head of the syndicate - The Red Baroness.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Malicious Mayhem
programme.desc: Playmaker takes on Varis and learns there’s more to Ai than meets the eye!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: Zak’s little Sister, Tori, shows up unexpectedly at an A-R-C event in the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony and Edyn follow Strag to his home realm of the Underneath. They came to get some of Strag's old relics that could be useful in their search for the Underneath Dreamstone.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: The A-R-C is in Paris for a three day racing event, during the opening of the newest attraction - the new LOUVRE TOWER. When Johnny finds himself on a losing streak, he opts to try a new jet upgrade to give him an edge.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler
programme.desc: The Campers find a time travelling clock on the beach!
programme.sub-title: Clockwork Slime / Ride the Haunted Howler

programme.title: Storm Hawks
programme.desc: Piper becomes fast friends with an alluring stranger named Lark, but as the Storm Hawks soon find out, there is more to their guest than meets the eye.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor needs a brain to complete his latest creation, Frankendino. But the only brain that’s good enough is Edgar’s, so Skor hands Skrap a serrated brain spoon and sends him off to fetch it.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony, Edyn and Strag are ambushed in the Bograth swamp by their old Shadow Magi enemy Chur. After a heated battle, Chur gets his hands on the Book of Elders and incinerates it with a fireball before leaving in satisfaction.

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: Tony returns to Earth through the Naroomi vortex relic in order to find the Core Dreamstone, while Edyn, Strag and the Magi Resistance Force battle Agram on the drained seabed of Orothe.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While Johnny and his friend Doug are on a practice run over the Pacific, Doug suddenly disappears in a flash of light. The Metajets discover this isn’t the first time jets have disappeared in the area, and head back to investigate.

programme.title: Street Sharks
programme.desc: The culmination of Dr. Piranoid's attempts at mass gene-slamming comes when he creates a fake vaccine which he claims will protect the citizens of Fission City against just such an attempt.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Tactician
programme.desc: A new transformer enters the solar system. On the moon, Thrust the master tactician arrives to assist Megatron in his battle against the Autobots, but all does not go according to plan.

programme.title: Massive Monster Mayhem
programme.desc: Master Mayhem’s got a new phone! It’s got apps, lasers, and it even talks. This super smart phone might even out-smart Master Mayhem himself. Meanwhile, Dome Diddy Dome is powered by a teen girl’s phone, dialing up destruction on Planet Earth.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Red Drawn / Pandora's Jock
programme.desc: A travelling salesman visits Lakebottom one boring rainy day and sells McGee a magic pencil.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While the team is at a racing event in Canada, Captain Strong is meeting with the World Council aboard their massive jet-liner headquarters.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: Pod Parents / Zombie Scouts
programme.desc: Suzi, desperate to get McGee sent home, invites her parents for a visit to Camp Lakebottom.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When Skor discovers a crystal hidden in the Extreme Fighting Championship Belt, he devises a plan to get it. Since only humans are allowed to compete, he tricks Edgar into becoming his protégé.

programme.title: Camp Lakebottom: S.P.U.D.S / Monster Hunters "R" Us
programme.desc: McGee, Gretchen and Squirt disturb the potato King!

programme.title: Magi-Nation
programme.desc: On the trail of the Kybar's Teeth Guardian Hyren, the kids find themselves saddled with Evu and Spencer, who choose to come along for the ride.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Dueling for Answers
programme.desc: Playmaker battles Zaizen to unlock Sol Tech’s databank and the secrets to his past!

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: Skor decides that if he can’t beat the Kung Fu Dino Posse, he might as well make fools of them – literally. Thanks to an unstable new cloning device, Skor makes clones of all four Dinos – and turns them into clowns.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: While on tour at a tropical island paradise, the team finds themselves facing off against a pack of sky-thieves - one of whom has an eye for Maggie.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Confrontation
programme.desc: The Decepticons capture all the children to use as hostages in exchange for the Autobots's minicons. Fred and Billy are officially introduced to the Autobots.

programme.title: MetaJets
programme.desc: A new group of aerial daredevils, the Stunt-Hawks, have arrived for a series of shows in Soaring Heights, which coincides with a string of daring aerial heists throughout the city.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: The richest stop of the WPT regular season brings out the biggest names in poker.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Three of the toughest pros in poker pull out all the stops to win a WPT title in Mississippi.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: A titanic battle on the Mississippi comes down to four players.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: It's fast action and big bucks in a slam bang Boardwalk battle for $1.4 million dollars.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Phil Hellmuth vs. Phil Ivey. What more do you need to know?

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Hall of Famer Billy Baxter tries to make the WPT Invitational his own private poker party.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Poker superstar Jennifer Harman is the last target standing at the final table.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: Way out west saddle bags full of cash await the winner of the World Poker Challenge.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: In the woods of Connecticut, Ted "Hit Man" Forrest looks to knockout his second WPT title.

programme.title: WPT Classics
programme.desc: WPT champion Van Nguyen leads the way as six of the finest female poker players battle.

programme.title: Ex on the Beach
programme.desc: The party comes to a dramatic end as a familiar face arrives to cause chaos in the villa. Will it be too much for John and Georgia and will Chloe finally have her wicked way with Sam? (S7, ep10)

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Bobby's Dilemma
programme.desc: The search for love begins on the beaches of Mexico. Socialite Daisy latches onto Aaron and Essex boy Bobby makes a move on Rhianne, but will the first Ex throw a spanner in the works? (S9, ep1)

programme.title: Ex On The Beach: Double Trouble
programme.desc: The dating continues as Bobby and Bayley have a heart to heart. Arron's head gets turned but will he stray from Daisy? New arrivals rock the villa to its core and someone has to leave. (S9, ep2)

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Cabo, Cabo, Cabo
programme.desc: The gang heads south of the border to Cabo and things get super spicy when Alex confronts Jessica about hooking up with Jason and the two nearly come to blows.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Lies and Goodbye
programme.desc: Things get tricky when Talan professes his love to Kristen shortly before Stephen does the same.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Don't Hate the Game
programme.desc: Kristen hooks up with Jessica's new crush. Stephen and LC share a moment in San Fran.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Our Last Prom
programme.desc: It's prom time again at LB and the usual hijinx are in full force. Kristin still has no date. Will Talan swoop in and take her, or is it stag city for the blonde bombshell?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Boys Are Like Purses
programme.desc: LC decides it's time to do what she does best and throw a poolside BBQ. Kristin reluctantly shows up briefly, and Stephen idly watches as Jason steals LC's heart.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The End of the Beginning
programme.desc: The time has finally come for the gang to graduate high school and leave their LB bubble... mixed emotions run high and the tears start a rolling.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: I Saw You Kiss Her
programme.desc: Jason kisses Jessica and gets busted by LC. Look out!

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Nothing More to Say
programme.desc: LC throws another party and after his moronic actions at the benefit. Jason comes crawling back to apologize, but he can't even do that well.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Last Surf
programme.desc: It's the end of the summer, and the time has come for everybody to leave beautiful Laguna Beach. The cast must come to terms with where their lives will go from here.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Thrill Of The Hunt
programme.desc: It is a new year with a new cast and the drama starts right away in Laguna Beach. Tessa is invited to queen bee Kyndra's BBQ, but when Tessa brings her best friend Raquel, it's clear they are both unwanted guests.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Who Wants To Date A Rock Star
programme.desc: Rocky throws Tessa a surprise birthday party but it's Chase who delivers Tessa the best present. Meanwhile, the Kyndra/Cameron relationship heats up behind Jessica's back.
programme.sub-title: Who Wants To Date A Rock Star

programme.title: Laguna Beach: We're Gonna Crash A Party
programme.desc: Christmas in Laguna heats up when Kyndra and Cami crash Rocky's holiday party. Meanwhile, Cameron gets defensive about his relationship with Jessica.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Old Friends, New Crushes
programme.desc: Breanna reaches out to her former best friend Raquel in hopes to repair their relationship, but things don't go smoothly. Meanwhile, Chase arranges for a double date so his pal Kelan can go after his long-time crush, Lexie.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Kiss and Don't Tell
programme.desc: When Tessa and Rocky travel to San Diego for a modeling gig for Tessa, Cameron decides to tag along. Sparks fly between him and Tessa, but will Jessica find out?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Headed For Heartbreak
programme.desc: It's Cameron's birthday but it's Tessa who is surprised when she realizes that Cameron has a totally different take on their hookup. Meanwhile, Kyndra rekindles her rocky romance with her ex-boyfriend, Tyler.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Hook Ups and Cover-Ups
programme.desc: Kyndra risks her relationship with Tyler when she gets a little too cozy with Cameron at Winter Formal. Will she be able to convince everyone nothing happened including Tyler's little sister, Nikki, before she tells?

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Spies, Lies and Alibis
programme.desc: Kyndra tries to calm the rumor mill by hosting a Valentine's Day dinner party with Tyler, but tensions flare when Cameron shows up. Meanwhile, Rocky takes it to another level with Alex on their romantic night out.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: First Date, Last Date
programme.desc: Tessa goes on a date with Derek, one of the popular guys, while Cameron and Jessica's relationship is on its last legs.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: It's, Like, Break-Up Season
programme.desc: Things get heated at the bonfire when Alex and Rocky determine the fate of their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: The Three Day Rule
programme.desc: Alex and Rocky have broken up, but rough times are still ahead, plus Tessa tries to get Derek to open up about their relationship.

programme.title: Laguna Beach: Only In Cabo
programme.desc: The entire crew from Laguna heads down to Cabo San Lucas for spring break; whatever happens in Cabo, stays in Cabo.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Bootcamp
programme.desc: In the 90 minute season premiere 25 girls arrive at bootcamp and meet their host Elle Macpherson. They also come face to face with the other judges, fashion designer Julian MacDonald, stylist Grace Woodward and ex-male model Charley Speed.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 1
programme.desc: In the first week of the main competition, the final 14 move into their new model house and participate in a lingerie themed photo shoot. The girls then have their first official elimination of the main competition. One girl is sent home.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 2
programme.desc: The girls receive their makeovers, but not all are happy with their new looks. The models are assigned a photoshoot wearing Links of London couture.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 3
programme.desc: The girls meet Girls Aloud singer Nicola Roberts and take part in a photoshoot for Beat Bullying.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 4
programme.desc: The girls take part in a posing challenge on Carnaby Street then film a commercial for Beyonce's new fragrance 'Heat'. The photoshoot involves being covered in chocolate which proves difficult for one girl who shows up hungover.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Week 5
programme.desc: Alesha Dixon meets the models and tasks them with selling her new jewelry line on live television. After meeting Grace in Gatwick airport they are given £500 to go on a shopping spree. They are then whisked off to Spain to do a photoshoot in swim wear.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 107
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an airplane take off while on a conveyor belt? Can cockroaches, fruit flies and flour beetles survive extreme levels of radiation?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 201
programme.desc: Could Jack have survived with Rose in the ending of "Titanic"? Is it possible to build a rocket-powered surfboard?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 34
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can an unamplified human voice shatter a wine glass? Does a rolling stone gather moss? Can a vacuum cleaner be converted into a jet engine?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 119
programme.desc: Will a motorcycle flip if a pole is thrust into the front wheel? Can someone break out of prison with a rope made of toilet paper, human hair or bedsheets?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 204
programme.desc: Are people actually well-acquainted with the backs of their own hands? Can a needle be thrown through a glass pane without shattering it? Is it really impossible to ride a bicycle underwater?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 159
programme.desc: When you get "cold feet," do your feet actually get colder? When the poop hits the fan, does everyone get covered in the ensuing chaos?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 7
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is a person with a tongue piercing more likely to get struck by lightning? Can a cannon be built out of a tree? Can the breathalyzer be beaten?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 2
programme.desc: Myths tested: Will using a cell phone near a gas pump cause an explosion? Will silicone breast implants explode or expand in low pressure? Can a standard CD-ROM drive shatter a CD?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 36
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is the brace position recommended in airplane crashes actually designed to kill people? Is driving while talking on the phone as dangerous as driving drunk?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 190
programme.desc: Can fireworks really launch a person over a lake? Can the weight of a bird be enough to tip a teetering car off of a cliff? Can a water heater turned on its side be used as a cannon?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 208
programme.desc: Can man beat machine in a 30-foot, standing-start sprint? Can a driver lose 10lbs during a race? Can the suction created by a speeding car rip loose a manhole cover during a street race?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 35
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a jet pack be created from plans on the internet? Do pyramids have special powers?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 135
programme.desc: Will opening all of the windows of a house during a hurricane lessen the structure's damage? Will a human head that has been dipped in liquid nitrogen for 5 seconds shatter when slammed into a table?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 150
programme.desc: Can someone really be knocked out of their socks? Is the force exerted between two cars crashing into each other at 50mph the same as a single car hitting a wall at 50mph?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 38
programme.desc: Myths tested: Is it possible to slingshot a person over the border and onto a mattress?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 164
programme.desc: Can honey bees lift a laptop? Can hitting a bug at high speeds on a motorcycle be fatal? Can hanging a bag of water repel flies?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 16
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a person take to the skies using only a lawn chair and weather balloons? Can someone test positive for heroin by eating a large amount of poppy seeds?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 195
programme.desc: Can you survive a 35-foot fall while covered in bubble wrap? Can a rocket-powered ejector seat flip an upside-down car back onto its wheels, as seen in "Die Another Day"?

programme.title: The Hustle
programme.desc: Two incorrigible scam artists -- one low rent and the other high class -- compete to swindle a naïve tech prodigy out of his vast fortune.

programme.title: Barbershop 2: Back in Business
programme.desc: The Barbershop is threatened by the arrival of a hip, well-financed chain barbershop that's about to open next door.

programme.title: You Stupid Man
programme.desc: A writer struggles to deal with the break-up with his girlfriend. It does not help with getting her out of his mind that she recently became a famous TV start.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: School for Scoundrels
programme.desc: A young guy short on luck enrolls in a class to build confidence to help win over the girl of his dreams, which becomes complicated when his teacher has the same agenda.

programme.title: Barbershop: The Next Cut
programme.desc: It's been more than 10 years since our last appointment at Calvin's Barbershop. Ice Cube, Cedric the Entertainer and the whole crew are back together for a quick trim, some good conversation, a little gossip...and to save their neighborhood!

programme.title: Lost In London
programme.desc: A first-of-its-kind film event which was filmed and screened live simultaneously in select cinemas around the world. The film is loosely based on Woody Harrelson's tabloid-worthy crazy London night-out resulting in him getting in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Clockwatchers
programme.desc: The relationship between four female temps all working for the same credit company is threatened with the arrival of a new hire, who lands a permanent position one of the women was vying for.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Old-school salesmen Billy (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Owen Wilson) try to reboot their careers by joining Google’s fiercely competitive internship program — with hilarious results!

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink in the Middle': The Panther's barbecue almost goes up in smoke when neighbor Aardvark tries to eat his boss, the Ant. 'Pink in the Poke': The Pink Panther delivers a singing telegram to a prison inmate who escapes and leaves Pinky locked up.
programme.sub-title: Pink In The Middle/Pink In The Poke

programme.title: Count Duckula: Ghostly Gold
programme.desc: Duckula travels to the black mountains in the Yukon to find treasure and gold.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'The Legend of El Pinko': When the Headless Jalapeno terrorizes the people of an old California village, El Pinko must come to the rescue. 'Pink Big': While working as a lab assistant to professor Von Schmarty, Pinky develops a super growth formula.
programme.sub-title: Legend Of El Pinko, The/Pink Big

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM chases and kidnaps Scott's former baby-sitter, Mrs. Simpson, to the puzzlement of MASK.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Mayhem steals the Book of Power from some monks hoping it will lead him to an ancient city full of riches.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted are discouraged when their fourth concert bombs and decide to give up music and the Wyld Stallions. Without telling the boys that their decision will jeopardize the future,
programme.sub-title: When The Going Gets Tough...Bill And Ted Are History

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: While in India, VENOM lures a cobra from a snake charmer.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink Rider': Pinky starts a delivery service and is menaced by a motorcycle gang and a monster truck company. 'The Midnight Ride of Pink Revere': When Paul Revere is conked on the head by a horseshoe, Pinky has to take over the famous ride.
programme.sub-title: Pinky Rider/The Midnight Ride Of Pink Revere

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'No Pink is an Island': Captain Pink and the Aardvark are stranded on a desert island and captured by a horde of ants. 'Pinky and the Golden Fleece': Shepherd Pinky goes on a quest to retrieve Goldie, the king of Greece's stolen royal sheep.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Deep in the Yucatan jungle at an ancient Mayan City a boy is seen lifting a very heavy stone with ease.

programme.title: Count Duckula: The Show Must Go On
programme.desc: Duckula decides to become an actor and stages the story of Jack and the Magic Walnut at the castle.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinky in Toyland': Witness to a bank heist, the Panther evades robbers by masquerading as a stuffed animal. 'The Detective of Oz': Pinky works as a hard-boiled detective in the Emerald City helping a dame named Dorothy find her stolen ruby pumps.
programme.sub-title: Pinky In Toyland/The Detective Of Oz

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Voodoo Man': When Voodoo Man's island is wiped out by a storm, he goes in search of the weatherman he believes is responsible. '7 Manly Men': When the toy in a box of cereal doesn't live up to its promise, the Manly Men confront the company owner.

programme.title: Count Duckula: Unreal Estate
programme.desc: Duckula is fed up with the Castle crumbling around him so he decides to sell it much to Igor's horror in Hollywood.

programme.title: The Wombles
programme.desc: Tobermory puts on his own TV show.
programme.sub-title: Tobermory On Television / Crossed Lines / Blow the Womble Down / Madame Cholet Returns

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Trains, Pains and Panthers': Rushing to a job interview, The Panther takes the Hover Train, but runs into the Dogfather and his gang. 'Wet and Wild Pinky': To be promoted to Lifeguard, Pink must baby-sit the boss' precocious niece.
programme.sub-title: Trains, Pains, And Panthers/Wet And Wild

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Sometimes even Mask just wants to have fun. That's why Matt Tracker'and Boris Bushkin in Bulldog have joined Brad Turner in Cheetah and Calhoun Burns in Raven at the Round Up Races.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted travel through time to find a truly big dude who will beat up Deacon's bully. Because of a minor malfunction with the phone booth, they end up in New England in 1773. There they serve as the impetus for the American Revolution.
programme.sub-title: More Heinous They Are The Harder They Fall

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: Using a special gelatin formula, gels the water in the canals of Venice in order to dig up Cleopatra's golden barge.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Ice Blue Pink': When the daredevil Pink Panther skis into a mountain crevasse, he discovers an ice-encased Neanderthal blue panther. 'Pink Trek': Starship commander Captain Pink and Voodoo Man try to defeat the villainous Bird the Merciless.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinkazuma's Revenge': Don Rosaro Pantero encounters Conquistadors, Aztecs and an uncooperative Parrot in the New World. 'Pinky Down Under': Australian bush guide Pinky is hired by two city slickers who try to poach the rare pygmy plaid kangaroo.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A map is pieced together from drawings on the backs of paintings in the Louvre which shows where the remote control is to explode the bombs which were placed in Paris during the German occupation.

programme.title: Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventures
programme.desc: Bill and Ted's adventures take them to the North Pole with Admiral Byrd, ancient Egypt, and King Tut, and finally to Dr. Livingston in the African jungles as they search for a rare exotic bird.
programme.sub-title: Birds Of A Feather Stick To The Roof Of Your Mouth

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM steals all the sails and kidnaps the sailmakers from an Icelandic town and then builds an enormous balloon which they fill with geothermal energy stolen from the town's heating plant.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Werewolf in Panther's Clothing': Pinky encounters a werewolf in a spooky European village where the inhabitants are all a little 'batty.' 'Pink Paparazzi': Pinky uses a video camera to try and capture a zillionaire on tape.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: The Australian Outback is the setting for a true Battle of the Giants. The Mask Team is pitted against a Venom Team.

programme.title: Pink Panther & Pals: The Pink is in the Mail
programme.desc: Pink Panther must deliver a package to Big Nose's door, but first he has to get through.
programme.sub-title: The Pink is in the Mail

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: A valuable life-giving meteor is stolen from Professor Stevens by VENOM.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pinky's Dilemma': Pinky's pen pal Queen Kong makes a surprise visit to the big city and his life is turned upside down when a cyclone hits. 'Oh Varkula': The Panther spends the night at a castle Varkula defending the ant from Count Varkula.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The Earth is flooded with instant custard. Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to outer space to find the Custard Mite of Glut, a small creature that can eat up the custard, but the planet that houses the Mite is controlled by armoured aliens.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Colonel K teams Danger Mouse up with a robot Penfold, and Penfold with a robot Danger Mouse. The robots prove to be a lot of trouble for the real ones, taking instructions too literally or getting stuck running in circles.
programme.sub-title: Four Heads Are Better Than Two

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'A Hard Days Pink': When Pinky's fairy god manager transforms five animals into a piano, Pinky tries to win the big battle of the bands contest. 'You Only Pink Twice': Secret agent Panther must deliver a top-secret valise to the president.
programme.sub-title: A Hard Days Pink/You Only Pink Twice

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: VENOM uses laser beams to dry up a waterfall in order to uncover the ancient Scarlet Empress.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Who's Smiling Now': Rookie police officer Panther is assigned to assist the great 'Inspector' in solving the case of the missing Mona Lisa. 'Rob'n Hoodwinked': the Panther joins up with the Dogfather who is posing as the famed Robin Hood.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'Pink-Anderthal Man': Manly Man pursues the Panther through the ages. 'Pink Kong': Despite strong opposition from Voodoo Man, the Panther helps Queen Kong realize her dream of becoming a famous torch singer in New York City.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold puts on Danger Mouse's suit and cannot get out, which confuses Colonel K into thinking he is Danger Mouse. Later, DM and Penfold go to Bratislavakia to find out why all the countries of Central Europe have swapped places.
programme.sub-title: There's a Penfold in my Suit

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Danger Mouse and Penfold travel to Australia where they pick up top secret plans from an agent rat in the form of a rugby ball. Penfold gets distracted by a boomerang and is later picked up by large bird of prey.

programme.title: THE NEW PINK PANTHER SHOW
programme.desc: 'A Nut at the Opera': When stage hand Pinky accidentally puts the opera's star tenor out of commission and must take over the lead himself. 'Hamm-N-Eggz': Hamm and Eggz royally mess up the wedding of the obnoxious daughter of a Mafioso hit-man.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: Penfold swallows Professor Squakencluck's new pill and is turned into a superhero called the Blue Flash. But he causes Danger Mouse more problems than usual as they try to catch a lost messenger pigeon.

programme.title: M.A.S.K.
programme.desc: hile cutting trees in the forest, Jacques discovers a petrified (stone) tree.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 9
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a three-bedroom terrace property with some interesting features near Chesterfield, a semi in Surrey with a distrinct lack of space and a batch of four flats in Leeds.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 3
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a terrace in Stoke on Trent, a maisonette in good condition and in Chard Somerset, Martin gets that sinking feeling!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a three bedroomed terraced house in Derbyshire, an Edwardian house in Croydon and a commercial unit in Ayreshire.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 19
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a former chapel in Tunbridge Wells, a 3 bed house in North London, and a 2 bedroom bungalow in Derby.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a house in Kent, a colourful property in Stoke-on-Trent and revisit a farm cottage in Dorset a year later.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit an end of terrace in Harrogate, a property in Teddington, Middlesex where strong vision is needed and in Derby we reveal the effect of inflation on house prices.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a two bed mid terrace in Greater Manchester, a ground floor flat in Balham and a former bakery in South Wales.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a tired house in Derby, a bedragelled bungalow boasting a big garden in Surrey and a mid-terrace in Cheshire where the bathrooms out-number the bedrooms!

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 8
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a one bedroom property with potential in Hammersmith, west London, a model property in Gillingham, Kent and a 1930's semi in Stockport.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 5
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a period house in Cheshire, a house in Kent and revisit a plot of land in Cheshire that we first saw at auction two years ago.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 16
programme.desc: Martin & Lucy visit a house in Kent, a property on the Isle of White and a property in Ripon.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Chelsea, Northumberland and London.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 10
programme.desc: Lucy and Martin visit a semi detatched house in South Wales, a two bed flat in Surrey and a property in Hastings. We see what happens when these properties go Under The Hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit properties in Devon and Dover.

programme.title: Homes Under The Hammer: Episode 11
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy visit a cottage in Orkney, a cottage in Berkshire we first saw in 2007 and a property in London.

programme.title: Capote
programme.desc: In 1959, Truman Capote, learns about the horrific and senseless murder of a family of four in Kansas. As he digs deeper into the story, he is inspired to expand the project into what would be his greatest work, In Cold Blood.

programme.title: Son Of The Pink Panther
programme.desc: Blake Edwards directs this romantic high-adventure that has Inspector Clouseau's illegitimate (and alarmingly similar!) son (Roberto Benigni) botching a mission to rescue a kidnapped princess (Debrah Farentino).

programme.title: Teen Wolf
programme.desc: A teenage boy's incredible werewolf powers improve the quality of his life in dramatic and hilarious ways.

programme.title: The Defiant Ones
programme.desc: In Stanley Kramer's cinema classic, screen legends Sidney Poitier and Tony Curtis star as two convicts on the run from a Southern work gang who are bound together by an unbreakable iron chain and separated by an unbridled hatred for each other.

programme.title: The Pink Panther
programme.desc: In this riotously funny farce, Peter Sellers introduced the world to Jacques Clouseau, the clumsiest Inspector ever to trip over a case, who is out to stop the notorious Phantom (David Niven) from stealing the priceless Pink Panther diamond!

programme.title: Trail of the Pink Panther
programme.desc: This tribute to the late Peter Sellers contains unused scenes from the previous Pink Panther films interspersed with new footage and features a great comedic cast.

programme.title: Futtock's End
programme.desc: In this silent-style comedy, General Futtock hosts a weekend at his country estate. Chaos erupts as the butler (Sir Michael Hordern) spies on guests, rum spills into the punch, and a lost Japanese tourist adds to the mayhem. Hilarity ensues.

programme.title: The Shape of Things to Come
programme.desc: Sometime in the future, man has set up colonies on the Moon, when Earth becomes uninhabitable. A madman decides to destroy the Moon colonies with his robots and automated ships, and only three people and their robot can stop him.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: A young farmer sets out to recruit mercenaries to defend his peaceful planet, which is under threat of invasion by the evil tyrant Sador and his armada of aggressors. Starring: George Peppard, Robert Vaughn, Richard Thomas

programme.title: Euronews
programme.desc: Euronews offers a unique perspective on world events. It empowers people to make up their own mind by delivering factual analysis and a diversity of viewpoints. Because all views matter, Euronews is "All Views".

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Judi Buenoano secretly murdered lovers to claim on insurance policies whilst nurse Genene Jones secretly killed at least 46 infants left in her care between 1980 and 1982.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women who kill husbands, lovers, rivals and parents will shock society. But a very special horror is reserved for women who will kill their own.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: In some cases, the transformation from everyday woman to brutal killer is activated by a man. A boyfriend or husband can become the focus of a deadly obsession.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A lovely lady with an innocent smile, kind eyes, a charming personality? No one would suspect a woman like that would murder. These women don’t look or behave like killers.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Under His Control
programme.desc: These are love stories with bleak, bloody endings. Blinded by desire, obsessed and malleable, some women fall into lethal relationships with dangerous, controlling men.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: No one doubts a woman’s capacity to love, but sometimes lust can turn lethal. In the ultimate fatal attraction, "Deadly Women" looks at cases of murder driven by obsessive love.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators, but the exceptions are deadly women indeed. In this episode, we’ll discover what drove these deadly women to prey on the unsuspecting.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception: they’ll do anything to satisfy their need for cash. This is the dangerous world of the fortune hunters.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over in a manic moment of fury. Once caught, revenge killers usually display remorse and atonement.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: The path towards revenge can sometimes lead to murder. It can be quick, fiery and violent. It can also be a dish served cold, the product of a calm, calculated plot.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Sometimes, when a man and a woman unite, a terrible urge for destruction can awaken in them both. Happy couples become deadly teams, intent on one goal: murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: Blood ties are strong ties, sometimes strong enough to pull a person into a murderous conspiracy. When a family member wields his or her power, the result can be death.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While their sisters chose a life of sensible, suburban motherhood, these deadly women chose a life of crime. They lived with the thrills, the danger and the deadly consequences of being outlaws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Married to Murder
programme.desc: To the outside world, their marriages seemed happy. But behind closed doors, there was no domestic bliss. These women wanted out, but getting a divorce wasn’t their preferred option.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenaged boy disappeared. Because they vanished within hours of each other, police believed the cases were linked. But they didn't know how.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Radical Agenda
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killer Abroad
programme.desc: Beginning in 1990, Europe found itself in the clutches of a serial killer. He became an international outlaw, hopping from country to country to evade capture and to kill again.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Search For Lisa Rene
programme.desc: When a young woman was grabbed from her Texas home, the police raced to find her abductors. On the face of it, the kidnapping seemed like the random act of desperate men.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, two desperate criminals fled the custody of a local deputy. Eluding authorities, they made their way across the country in a wave of car theft, abduction, and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files: .22 Caliber Killer
programme.desc: In Buffalo, New York, a sniper targeted African-American men. He held a city hostage, and threatened to ignite a racial powder keg. And it looked like others might be following his bloody example.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Model Killer
programme.desc: It's a model's job to rivet the public's attention. But in 1984, some aspiring models began attracting publicity in a terrible new way.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hidden Agenda
programme.desc: Across the Midwest, a band of armed robbers struck banks at the rate of nearly one per month. They attacked with lightning precision and lethal force. They were in and out in five minutes.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion.
programme.sub-title: Go Light On The Heavy Water

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Corporal LeBeau pretends to be a visiting French scientist while Hogan smuggles out the real one.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan sneaks out of camp to a local German Hofbrau House to get the details of a nearby German army unit.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans want to safely build a synthetic fuel plant in Stalag 13, but Hogan convinces them that there is oil beneath the camp.
programme.sub-title: Oil For The Lamps Of Hogan

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: During an operation to send out twenty Allied soldiers, two of them attempt an early escape and are nearly captured.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan talks Klink into building an officers' club, whereby a boat can be built to sail away with an escaped British POW and the German gunsight he snagged while escaping.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan and his men must destroy a German anti-aircraft artillery unit so that the Allies can send in a bombing raid on Hitler's birthday.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have stolen a gold shipment from the French and Hogan must convince Klink to have it moved to the safety of Stalag 13.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's latest underground contacts are secretly German spies.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.desc: Hogan has a mission to move a mobile anti-aircraft artillery battery, but Klink's new tough second-in-command is impeding the Heroes.

programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine, Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic.

programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany, so he creates a health spa.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Fake Arab Spring?
programme.desc: Who was really behind a series of revolts, protests, and uprisings that swept the Middle East starting in late 2010?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Ouija Boards?
programme.desc: Harmless board game or portal to the spirit world? Richard delves into the history and folklore of 'talking boards' with a collector of Ouija boards and a world renowned paranormal investigator.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The O'Hare UFO Incident
programme.desc: Richard investigates a UFO sighting over Chicago's O'Hare airport that was witnessed by dozens of people, including an airline captain, his crew and several airport officials.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Ruthless Killers
programme.desc: Ruthless Killers: They kill for all manner of reasons. Their victims: men, women, and even children. What motivates them, and how can they be stopped? Investigators reach their limits hunting them down.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Bank Robbers
programme.desc: Bank robbers. They are clever, planning their crimes for years. And if necessary, they even put human lives at risk. For investigators, each heist is different. But all robbers have one thing in common: they steal millions.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: This is the tragic tale of Susan Smith, who shocked the nation in 1994 by fabricating a carjacking to cover up the drowning murders of her two young sons.
programme.sub-title: The Mum Who Murdered Her Kids

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In a gruesome 1989 case, Tracey Wigginton and her accomplices lure Edward Baldock with promises of a good time, only to brutally stab him to death, sparking a sensational trial that raised questions about the roles of her accomplices.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: University students Holly Dunn and Chris Maier are ambushed along railway tracks in August 1997. By 1999, a string of similar attacks leads police to Angel Maturino Reséndiz, who travels by freight train between murders across three states.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2004, Marc Dutroux was sentenced to life for kidnapping, raping, and murdering young girls in Belgium. His 1996 arrest and delayed trial exposed horrific crimes and official failings, sparking public outrage.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1983, Graeme Cunningham vanishes in Salt Lake City. Detective Don Bell discovers Arthur Bishop, who confesses to killing Graeme and four other boys. Bishop is found guilty in 1984 and executed in 1988.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 28, 2005, Joan Porco attends the trial of her son Christopher, accused of murdering his father and attacking her. Despite her initial identification and later refusal to testify, Christopher is found guilty based on circumstantial evidence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Murder by the Mob depicts the battle for justice by Peppino Impastato's family after his 1978 death was misclassified. His mother and brother reopened the case, leading to mafia boss Gaetano Badalamenti's 2002 conviction for the murder.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2006, Nina Sharanova vanished in Oakland. Her ex-husband, Hans Reiser, was convicted of her murder after their son’s testimony and leading police to her body. Reiser is now appealing the conviction.
programme.sub-title: Death of a Mail Order Bride

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1990, Danny Rolling killed five students in Gainesville, Florida. He confessed to the crimes, pleaded guilty to avoid the death penalty, but was ultimately sentenced to death and executed 16 years later.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1991, Ray and Faye Copeland, the oldest death row couple in the USA, are convicted of murdering five drifters. Police find the bodies after a tip-off. Faye's death sentence is commuted to life in 1999.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On October 11, 1998, Dr. Harold Shipman is tried for murdering fifteen elderly patients. Exhumation and evidence of lethal morphine lead to his conviction. He is later found to have killed 215 people.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, Ashley Pond and Miranda Gaddis disappear in Portland. Neighbor Ward Weaver, a suspect with a violent history, is later found guilty of their murders and sentenced to life in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: A picture-perfect Canadian couple Karla Homolka and Paul Bernardo join to perform torture and mutilation on young victims - crimes that are virtually unspeakable. Two teenage girls were raped and murdered, and the couple even filmed themselves doing it.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In July 2000, Sarah Payne is abducted and murdered. Roy Whiting, a convicted sex offender, is found guilty and sentenced to life in 2001. Sarah’s case leads to the implementation of “Sarah’s Law” in the UK in 2011.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On June 27, 2005, Dennis Rader, known as the BTK killer, pleads guilty to ten murders he committed in Wichita, Kansas, from 1974 to 1994. After a journalist's article reignites the case, Rader is arrested and sentenced to ten life terms without parole.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In September 1987, Simon Dale is murdered. His ex-wife, Susan Wilberforce, is acquitted of the crime but later convicted of fraud and sentenced to seven years. The murder remains unsolved.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: Nathaniel Bar-Jonah, a paedophile, is convicted in 2002 for multiple crimes but not for the 1996 disappearance of Zachary Ramsay. Zachary’s body is never found, and Bar-Jonah dies in prison in 2008.
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Ate the Evidence

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In January 2002, fashion journalist Christa Worthington is found murdered in her Truro home. Christopher McCowen is convicted in 2006 of her murder, robbery, and rape, despite his claims of innocence and other DNA found at the scene.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2001, British traveler Peter Falconio is presumed murdered in the Australian outback. Joanne Lees survives the attack, and Bradley John Murdoch is convicted of the murder in 2005. Peter's body is never found.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1999, NFL player Rae Carruth is convicted for orchestrating the shooting of his pregnant girlfriend. He is sentenced to 18-24 years. Their son, Chancellor, has cerebral palsy.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1975, 15-year-old Martha Moxley is murdered in Belle Haven, Connecticut. The case goes cold until 2002, when Michael Skakel, a family member, is convicted based on new evidence. Skakel maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 2007, Meredith Kercher is murdered in Italy. Amanda Knox and Raffaele Sollecito are initially convicted but later exonerated. Rudy Guede is convicted. The Kercher family still seeks justice.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: On December 7, 1993, Colin Ferguson killed six and injured nineteen in the Long Island Railroad Massacre. Defending himself at trial, he bizarrely questioned his own victims and was sentenced to over 300 years in prison.

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials
programme.desc: In 1995 Paris, Guy Georges, a serial killer, was linked to multiple murders through DNA and later confessed in court. He was sentenced to life in prison, leading to the establishment of a DNA database for offenders in France.

programme.title: Psychic Witness
programme.desc: Police suspect foul play when an Oregon mother vanishes. In California, a woman does not return home after a night out. Psychics use their gifts to unravel mysteries.

programme.desc: The murder of an elderly couple shocks a small New York town. An Ohio family searches for a missing woman.Two psychics saw everything that happened. Noreen Renier senses the killer is lying about his alibi. Georgia Rudolph leads police to the body.

programme.desc: A scientist discovers footage on his security camera that even he can't explain; and a sailing ship from the 1800's is home to a ghostly crew.

programme.desc: A medium experiences the torture of a prison snitch killed by other inmates. Two soldiers in Iraq are startled by ghostly encounters in abandoned bunkers; and a police officer witnesses paranormal activity in a deserted spa.

programme.desc: An unknown axe murderer still stalks a family he brutally murdered a century ago and then next-door a spirit with a deadly secret haunts a young couple. An off the beaten path bar is stocked with other worldly spirits.

programme.title: My Ghost Story

programme.title: My Ghost Story
programme.desc: A man and his girlfriend dream of owning their own "haunted attraction," but end up owning an actual haunted house; and the ghostly voice of a passenger who died in a plane crash is heard in a chilling recording.

programme.desc: A phantom breaches security at a South Carolina government building. A pipe-smoking ghost haunts a lighthouse. A son killed in a car accident makes his presence known to his grieving mother. A demon attacks guests at a Texas house.

programme.desc: A cemetery that's home to 80,000 dead souls becomes a "ghost magnet"; a family discovers that their new home is filled with the sounds of strange footsteps and whispered conversations; and more.

programme.desc: Sam Christie has been plagued by a horrible secret since he was a boy. After seeing ghosts of the past and suffering terrible nightmares, he starts realizing the truth

programme.title: Very Bad Men: The Cold Blooded Charmer
programme.desc: A smooth-talking con man works his way into the affections of a small-town community, with brutal consequences

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: House of Horrors
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found floating next to a dock. The case takes the detectives into a sinister world from which few come out unharmed.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime
programme.desc: After finding the body of a young girl in a stream located in the suburbs of Montreal, investigators strive to retrace a murderer who knew how to use water to his advantage.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: On October 1, 2000, 10-year-old Heather Thomas disappeared from her father’s Cloverdale townhouse. Ertmoed is arrested and confesses that he lured Heather into his apartment on the pretext of showing her pictures of birds and strangles her to death.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mortal Passion
programme.desc: In early April 2000, two students discover the lifeless body of a young woman on the edge of a river. The victim has wounds on her neck, but a murder weapon is not found at the scene. Investigators find a piece of paper in the victim’s pant pocket.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Mr. Big
programme.desc: On the evening of April 21, 2002, six weeks after being assaulted by her boyfriend Michael Bridges, and despite a restraining order against him, Erin Chorney is seen getting into a Ford Taurus known to belong to Bridges’ mother.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Hell's Gate
programme.desc: On June 17, 1994, a tugboat operator is towing a log boom down the Fraser River from Port Coquitlam when he notices something caught up on one of the logs. Upon closer inspection, he discovers a human body.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Incorrible
programme.desc: The story of a young girl savagely beaten by a group of teenagers and later found dead in a river leads to a troubling inquiry whereby water causes several complications as well as the solution to the case.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: When George Long's girlfriend demands they get married, he breaks off the relationship. But nothing can stop Cheryl's relentless obsession. If she can't marry him, nobody can.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Six Degrees of Separation
programme.desc: A college graduate strikes up a relationship with her superior at a new job. When he becomes abusive, her attempts to escape prove to be no match for the highly trained investigator.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: After moving to a quiet suburb, "Mary" finds a new best friend in next-door neighbor Jane. But, before long, it's clear that there's something strange about Jane.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: She-Devil
programme.desc: When Tom Donato's wife Kristin turns controlling, he vows to get a divorce. But Kristin exacts a terrible price for revenge and frames him as a dangerous stalker.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Married To Madness
programme.desc: When Susan Zarriello's ex-husband David unleashes a sadistic torrent of cyber attacks 15 years after their divorce, Susan realizes he's been watching her for years.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Signed, Your Deadliest Fan
programme.desc: A successful comic book author and illustrator encounters a fan who wants far more than an autograph.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: In the Spotlight
programme.desc: A well-respected TV news journalist in San Diego is stalked by a deranged fan who threatens rape and murder if she doesn't follow explicit instructions while on air.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Fear F.M.
programme.desc: K.T. Mills is a popular radio DJ with a friendly voice. But when one deranged listener becomes obsessed with the woman behind the mic, her life is turned upside down.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stealth Stalker
programme.desc: When Terri Mendez breaks up with Jose, she doesn't know he's watching every move she makes. When Terri discovers hidden cameras in her bedroom, she realizes there's nowhere to hide.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Love is a Battlefield
programme.desc: A young nurse falls in love and marries the man of her dreams. But before long, her husband becomes violent and controlling.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Deadly Envy
programme.desc: An aspiring Hollywood actress is reacquainted with an old friend and fellow actress who becomes deeply jealous of her beauty and success.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stalked.com
programme.desc: After meeting online, Patrick begins to stalk Kristen across the web. Kristen begins to realize that nothing will stop her cyberstalker from tracking her down with deadly intentions.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Web of Destruction
programme.desc: Mai Hlee Xiong is a beauty pageant contestant fresh out of college. A stalker is watching her every move and he'll stop at nothing to defame her good reputation.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of genetic modification in Hawaii; shattering a glass; curing a dust allergy through eating worms.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: The science of 'dad dancing'; Liz tracks her family tree through the use of DNA; Jem builds a singing road.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: A demo of calorific value by taking part in the Oxbridge Boat Race; testing MP's abilities to calculate risk.

programme.title: Bang Goes The Theory
programme.desc: Liz investigates sunburns; making museum visitors act younger and smarter.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: TORNADO
programme.desc: A tornado is a violently rotating column of air extending from the base of a thunderstorm down to the ground. Tornadoes are capable of completely destroying well-made structures, uprooting trees, and hurling objects through the air like deadly missiles.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: VOLCANOES
programme.desc: Volcanoes are Earth’s geologic architects. They’ve created more than 80 percent of our planet’s surface and their explosive force has crafted both mountains and craters.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Winds Of Autumn
programme.desc: This year he starts off by getting prepared in a wind tunnel, then he and his chase partner Mark Robinson head to Newfoundland for more wild weather action. Then, it's off to another encounter where the wild wind fans a raging inferno.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane Triple Threat
programme.desc: George chases deadly hurricanes in the USA: Gustav in Louisiana and Hanna in North Carolina. He then flies with USAF Hurricane Hunters into Ike over Cuba, meeting it again as it makes a wild destructive landfall in Galveston, Texas.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Water
programme.desc: In this episode, George investigates the wild side of water in dangerous class 5 river rapids, a flooded cave, and even in the ocean surrounded by massive Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Thunder Down Under
programme.desc: In Australia George teams up with storm chaser Jimmy Deguara to witness summer storms in the outback. While in Oz, he dives the magnificent Great Barrier Reef, and explores just how painful is the sting of the venomous Box Jellyfish.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Naked Science: What's Wrong With Pluto
programme.desc: Naked Science investigates the violent cosmological forces that create planets and discover what it is that makes a planet a planet.

programme.title: Naked Science: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second-largest planet in the solar system. Storms on this gas giant can cover an area bigger than the United States Clouds of the gas race around the planet at over 1000 miles per hour generating fierce electrical storms and lightning.

programme.title: Naked Science: How To Destroy A Planet
programme.desc: The Earth is built to last. It is a 4,550,000,000-year-old, 5,973,600,000,000,000,000,000-tonne ball of rock and iron. It has taken more devastating asteroid hits in its lifetime than you've had hot dinners, and it still orbits happily around the sun.

programme.title: Naked Science: Venus
programme.desc: Earth has an evil twin. Venus. It is shrouded in a lethal atmosphere of carbon dioxide and acid rain. The surface temperature is hot enough to melt lead and the pressure high enough to crush a nuclear submarine.

programme.title: Naked Science: Death Of The Earth
programme.desc: The earth is 4.5 billion years old and it is slowly dying. Tectonic activity is slowly cooling the planet – the continents will eventually move together to form a new supercontinent called Pangea Ultima.

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 1: The Solar System
programme.desc: This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see, how we can live in space and what science tells us about the past and the future as we journey inside out of space.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.
